name: font-atlas-antialias
desc: Keep the primary UI CreateFontA path on CLEARTYPE_QUALITY, but restore the D3D glyph-atlas CreateFontA path to ANTIALIASED_QUALITY. RE: FUN_004b0960 renders dynamic glyphs into a 16bpp DIB, then the client extracts alpha from the high nibble of the first byte (`byte >> 4`). Live/user-visible symptoms and the GDI raster comparison show Pretendard 14px with ClearType produces mostly partial-alpha outline pixels in that atlas path. Applying this after font-cleartype changes only the atlas quality push 5 -> 4; face remains Pretendard and charset remains HANGEUL_CHARSET.
verified: Raw original bytes were verified against the previous canonical playable 98ca at file 0x000b0b91 = 6a05. Promoted to the default stack after live runtime-patch verification on the real game EXE showed the atlas-antialias path removed the hollow/outline glyph symptom while preserving the Pretendard face. Current canonical 79142d12 carries the patched byte 6a04 in the default stack.

patches.note: FUN_004b0960 D3D glyph-atlas CreateFontA quality: CLEARTYPE_QUALITY(5) -> ANTIALIASED_QUALITY(4), applied after font-cleartype.
